critic_notes: Three questions covering Aktionspunkte 8.1.5-8.1.7 on IT/ICS/IoT system inventory. All correct answers are directly supported by source text. All quotes have minor space-in-compound-word artifacts from PDF line-break normalization (beziehungsweise, zuordnen, geeignet rendered with internal spaces), but match under aggressive normalization. Topic 'modellierung' is borderline -- Strukturanalyse is a pre-step to modellierung -- but acceptable since it concerns scope/asset mapping. Schema and page ranges correct.

issues.detail: Fragment 'beziehungs weise' should be 'beziehungsweise'; fragment 'zu ordnen' should be 'zuordnen'. Soft-hyphen line-break artifact -- matches under no-space normalization.
Fragment 'ge eignet' should be 'geeignet'. Soft-hyphen line-break artifact -- matches under no-space normalization.
Fragment 'zu ordnen' should be 'zuordnen'. Soft-hyphen line-break artifact -- matches under no-space normalization.
